scripts.cap:copy:google-services: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path 'google-services.json') { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'android/app' | Out-Null; Copy-Item 'google-services.json' 'android/app/google-services.json' -Force; Write-Host 'google-services.json copiado para android/app' } else { Write-Host 'google-services.json não encontrado na raiz do app' }"
